CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY NORMAN KRIEGER INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAHLER PAUL DBA ELIZABETH EXPORT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAHLER PAUL DBA ELIZABETH EXPORT INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORMAN KRIEGER INC. $421.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $441.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
